app.name: FinPath
app.tagline: Your money, on your own cycle.

common.name: Name
common.title: Title
common.confirmDelete: Delete this item? This cannot be undone.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.greeting: Here is your financial month at a glance.
dashboard.noData: Add a few transactions to see your charts come to life.
dashboard.daysLeft: {{count}} days left in this financial month

expenses.title: Expenses
expenses.empty: No expenses for this financial month yet.

income.title: Income
income.empty: No income recorded for this financial month.

budgets.title: Budgets
budgets.empty: Create a budget to track a category against a limit.

goals.title: Goals
goals.empty: Set a goal and watch your progress grow.

fixed.title: Fixed expenses
fixed.empty: Add recurring bills like rent, internet or subscriptions.
fixed.carryNote: Carried forward automatically each financial month.

analytics.title: Analytics
analytics.noHistory: Complete a financial month to build your history.

settings.title: Settings
settings.monthStartHelp: Your budgeting cycle resets on this day each month.
settings.resetConfirm: This permanently deletes all FinPath data on this device. Continue?
settings.importError: That file could not be read as a FinPath backup.
settings.about: FinPath stores everything locally on your device. No account, no servers.

onboarding.subtitle: Set up your finances in a few quick steps.
onboarding.s1Title: When does your money month start?
onboarding.s1Help: Pick the day your salary lands or you prefer to reset. Most people choose the 1st or their payday.
onboarding.s2Help: Salary, business or side income — you can add more later.
onboarding.s3Help: Pick the categories you actually use. Tap to toggle.
onboarding.s4Help: Optional, but goals make saving stick.
onboarding.s5Help: Add FinPath to your home screen for an app-like, offline experience.

install.android: Tap the menu (⋮) → “Add to Home screen”.
install.desktop: Click the install icon in your browser’s address bar.
